# Brother Handyman Services L.L.C

> Family-run handyman business serving Idaho and Washington. Owner-operator Kenny handles home repairs, painting, drywall, plumbing, fencing, and carpentry.

Brother Handyman Services is a licensed L.L.C. operating across Idaho and Washington. The business is owner-operated by Kenny — customers talk to the same person who shows up to do the work. Pricing is quote-based with no hidden fees. The business covers residential handyman services including small repairs, painting, drywall and texturing, basic plumbing, fencing, and carpentry and assembly work.

## Services

- [Home Repairs](https://brothers-handyman-production.up.railway.app/#services): Drywall patches, door adjustments, weather stripping, caulking, and small household fixes.
- [Painting](https://brothers-handyman-production.up.railway.app/#services): Interior and exterior painting, staining, touch-ups, and surface prep.
- [Drywall & Texturing](https://brothers-handyman-production.up.railway.app/#services): Hanging, taping, mudding, and texture matching.
- [Plumbing](https://brothers-handyman-production.up.railway.app/#services): Leaky faucets, running toilets, garbage disposals, fixture swaps, and basic pipe work.
- [Fencing](https://brothers-handyman-production.up.railway.app/#services): Wood, vinyl, and chain link installation and repairs; gate replacements.
- [Carpentry & Assembly](https://brothers-handyman-production.up.railway.app/#services): Shelving, trim work, deck repairs, furniture assembly, custom builds.

## Service Area

- Idaho — statewide
- Washington — statewide

## Contact

- [Call Kenny: (208) 790-1971](tel:+12087901971)

- [About](https://brothers-handyman-production.up.railway.app/#about): Business background and values.
